element_introduction_order.mastery_context: star attack doubles as platform for reaching inaccessible areas; core to both combat and puzzle-solving throughout game
required for progression; essential for accessing secret items in each stage
defeated using star attack; variety increases in difficulty through stages
required for good ending; hidden in secret areas in each of six stages; collecting all without continue unlocks Stage 7
six bosses must be defeated to complete initial playthrough; pattern-based combat
game loops back; requires collection of all hidden items to unlock true Stage 7 and good ending

element_introduction_order.first_appears: after collecting all magic items without continue
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: final challenge; contains additional boss required for good ending

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: intense difficulty curve with escalating challenge; designed with arcade-style pacing (gameplay in upper screen portion, score display lower); tension builds through stage progression with bosses marking major climaxes

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: hidden areas accessible via star attack platforms contain magic items; secret stage accessible only after collecting all items without continue
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: magic items hidden in secret rooms throughout six stages; Stage 7 unlocked as reward for item collection and no-continue playthrough

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduces core mechanics (jumping, star attack, star-as-platform) in safe context; basic enemy patterns in Stage 1-2
difficulty_curve.mid_game: escalating enemy variety and complexity; Stage 3-4 introduces more demanding precision platforming with star platforms
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 5-6 combines all mechanics at high difficulty; boss encounters require pattern mastery; Stage 7 (secret) represents ultimate challenge with additional boss

notable_level_patterns.description: areas requiring player to use spawned stars as platforms to reach otherwise inaccessible regions; doubles as both traversal challenge and secret item gating mechanism
notable_level_patterns.example_level: present throughout all six stages; critical in hidden item rooms

notable_level_patterns.description: combat-focused areas where player must defeat multiple enemies in sequence using star attack
notable_level_patterns.example_level: escalates in complexity from Stage 1 through Stage 6

notable_level_patterns.description: contained level environment with distinct aesthetic; features Ohagi enemies; includes interior navigation sections
pattern-based combat requiring mastery of timing and star attack placement; one major boss concludes each stage
notable_level_patterns.example_level: six total (Stages 1-6); seventh secret boss in Stage 7

notable_level_patterns.description: game requires replaying stages to discover hidden items; second playthrough loops through same six stages with goal of collecting all magic items without continue

sources_used: wikipedia - gameplay mechanics, story structure, development context
tcrf - stage structure details, hidden content (magic items, Stage 7), enemy types (Ohagi), difficulty information
data_crystal - technical cartridge data confirming NES platform and mapper
